input.command:
source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import numpy as np

# Create a simple test image
img = Image.new('RGB', (224, 224), color=(200, 180, 150))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Draw a simple eye shape
draw.ellipse([50, 50, 174, 174], fill=(255, 255, 255), outline=(50, 50, 50), width=2)
draw.ellipse([80, 80, 144, 144], fill=(50, 50, 100), outline=(0, 0, 0), width=2)
draw.ellipse([95, 95, 105, 105], fill=(0, 0, 0))

img.save('test_eye.png')
print('Test image created')
"
